# ResuVibe

> ResuVibe is an AI-powered career platform that generates complete, company-branded interview portfolios—including ATS-optimized resumes, cover letters, 90-day roadmaps, and RAID logs—directly from a job description URL.

## Core Features

- [Resume Generator](https://www.resuvibe.com/features/resume): Creates AI-tailored, ATS-optimized resumes mapped to specific job descriptions using the XYZ formula.

- [Executive Dashboards](https://www.resuvibe.com/features/dashboard): Company-branded, interactive dashboards available to Premium users.

- [Pipeline Management](https://www.resuvibe.com/features/pipeline): Built-in Kanban tracker and analytics for monitoring application stages.

## Documentation and Support

- [Help System](https://www.resuvibe.com/support): Contextual guides and tutorials for onboarding.

- [FAQ](https://www.resuvibe.com/faq): Answers to common questions about ATS scoring, URL scraping, and AI vibe editing.
